summary: KOLO CRM v2.0.0 UI/UX Redesign Testing - All major UI visibility issues FIXED

login_page: KOLO text logo visible with accent dot
Email and password fields visible with good contrast
register_page: KOLO text logo visible with accent dot
'7 days free · No credit card' badge visible
All form fields (Full name, Phone, Email, Password) visible
landing_page: 'Try for free' button visible with gradient
Hero section with 'Follow every client' headline
dashboard: My Profile link visible and working
Contextual message '9 overdue tasks to handle' visible
'Overdue — Follow up now' links visible in orange
settings_profile_page: All icons VISIBLE (User, Phone, Card, MapPin, Mail, Bell, Lock)
Theme toggle with sun/moon switch WORKING
dark_mode: All text visible on dark background
All icons have proper color (not white on white)
Cards have proper borders and contrast
light_mode: Theme toggle switches to light mode
All text visible (dark text on white background)
Sun icon shows in theme toggle when in light mode
prospects_list: Status badges visible with colors: Contacted (blue), New (gray), Offer (orange), Qualified (purple/green)
prospect_detail: Status selector buttons visible (New, Contacted, Qualified, Offer, Signed)
edit_prospect_modal: Full name field with data visible
add_prospect_modal: Source options visible: Manual, Leboncoin, SeLoger, Network, Referral
Status options visible: New, Contacted, Qualified, Offer, Signed

invisible_buttons_icons.details: All icons now have proper color using theme-aware c('text') or explicit colors, no longer white on white

edit_prospect_modal.details: Modal now shows all fields (name, phone, email, source dropdown, notes) - was previously blank except Save

source_dropdown.details: Source is implemented as button group with options: Manual, Leboncoin, SeLoger, Network, Referral

temperature_button.details: Temperature button/section visible in prospect detail page

dark_mode_visibility.details: All text and icons visible in dark mode with proper contrast

light_mode_visibility.details: All text and icons visible in light mode

theme_toggle.details: Sun/Moon toggle switch working, changes theme-light/theme-dark class on body

critical_code_review_comments: Theme toggle implementation is working - uses changeTheme function with Sun/Moon icons
All icons use c('text') or explicit colors for theme-aware rendering
Edit prospect modal properly displays all fields with populated data
Source selection uses button group instead of dropdown - good mobile UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign v2.0.0 complete. All previously reported visibility issues (invisible buttons, white icons on white, blank edit modal, missing temperature button, broken source dropdown) are now FIXED. Theme toggle (sun/moon) working. Light and dark modes both render content properly. Test user: test@test.com / testtest.
